Dialog.name: MSG_INAI_YUKARI
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 1 10006 0 0}Junpei's not in this car, either.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 1 10008 0 0}He should know it's too dangerous to go alone.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 1 10009 0 0}Junpei was acting kind of strange, wasn't he? Why'd he snap and get so upset?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 1 10010 0 0}Well, I guess we can ask him once we've caught up to him. Let's go![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_CATCH_JUNPEI
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 1 10012 0 0}Oh no, he's surrounded by enemies! We gotta help him quick![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_KASOKU_YUKARI
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 1 10014 0 0}No way... Is the train getting faster!?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_KANOKE_MES
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}No time for that now...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_KANOKE_MES_TEST
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1062 0 0}For the last train of the day, there are quite a few people on board.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_KANOKE_MES_CAPP
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1093 0 0}It's weird to think this is actually a person...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_HOUKOU_TIGAU_Y
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 1 10015 0 0}There's no time to go back! Come on![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_SOTIJYANAI
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 1 10017 0 0}If the Dark Hour ends, it'll be a disaster.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 1 10018 0 0}The passengers could be at risk... Secure the monorail immediately.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_DUNGE_BOSS
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 1 10019 0 0}Your primary target is up ahead! Are you ready?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_KANOKE_JUNPEI
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2077 0 0}...This isn't gonna pop open and jump scare us, is it?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_CHIGAU_JUNPEI
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2007 0 0}Dude, what're you lookin' at that for? C'mon, let's go.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_INAI_YUKARI_2
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 1 10009 0 0}Junpei was acting kind of strange, wasn't he? Why'd he snap and get so upset?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 1 10010 0 0}Well, I guess we can ask him once we've caught up to him. Let's go![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_KASOKU_YUKARI_3
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 1 10014 0 0}No way... Is the train getting faster!?[n]{f 1 1}
